summary: You are a spokesperson for a group of civilian experts on humanity's first interstellar mission, chosen by lot to lead the Contact Expert Commission aboard the starship Daedalus. As the ship travels through hyperspace toward the Tau Ceti system, you must guide the debate among scientists, diplomats, and thinkers about how to approach potential alien life. The weight of this historic responsibility rests on your shoulders as the crew looks to you for direction.
